name: References
content_html:
References

Every VBWD sub-domain is itself a reference implementation. They run on the same images, with different plugin sets and CMS content. Click through to see each one live.

Lucky Shop — multi-vendor e-commerce

Industry: Retail / sporting goods · Stack: Shop + Discount + Stripe + CMS

A multi-brand storefront running on the same codebase as the hotel engine. Products, cart, checkout, coupon codes — every primitive the shop plugin provides, wired to the CMS page system.

Visit shop.vbwd.cc

Alpine Hotel — resort booking

Industry: Hospitality · Stack: Booking + Stripe + Email

Room-inventory calendar, overlapping date-range availability checks, instant e-mail confirmation. Canonical use of the booking plugin.

Visit hotel.vbwd.cc

Dr. Ríos Clinic — medical intake

Industry: Healthcare · Stack: Booking + Subscription + Email

Same booking primitive, re-themed and re-labelled as a clinic appointment intake. Demonstrates how one plugin serves two industries without code changes.

Visit doctor.vbwd.cc

GHRM Software Catalogue

Industry: Developer tools · Stack: GHRM + Subscription + Stripe

GitHub-backed product catalogue where each SKU is a private repo. Buying a subscription grants read access; the plugin manages GitHub team membership automatically.

Visit ghrm.vbwd.cc

VBWD SaaS — every plugin but shop & booking

Industry: Internal dog-food · Stack: 13 plugins active

The kitchen-sink demo: Stripe + PayPal + YooKassa payments, LLM chat, tarot-reading, analytics, GHRM, CMS, email, mailchimp, subscription. Useful for finding bugs before customers do.

Visit saas.vbwd.cc

Your reference here?

Ship with VBWD and we'll feature your public launch on this page.

Talk to us
meta_title: References — VBWD demo verticals and launched customers
meta_description: Five live reference implementations of VBWD: shop, hotel, clinic, software store, kitchen-sink SaaS.
